insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work until a future version.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and the block_progress capability in their checkout UI extensions. They should explore alternative solutions to achieve the same functionality. The deprecation does not affect existing extensions immediately, but it's essential to plan for the migration to avoid future breaking changes. Developers can use the Checkout UI extensions API to find alternative solutions.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not be directly affected by this deprecation, but they may experience changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions as developers migrate to new solutions.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is crucial because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which are essential for merchants to customize their checkout experiences. Developers must adapt to the change to ensure their extensions continue to work as expected.
insight.code_example: query { checkout { id } } mutation { checkoutComplete { checkout { id } } }

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, requiring updates to existing extensions.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more flexibly, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs, ensuring that existing workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, including updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload, and long URL wrapping.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting in API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting in version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS extensions, app pricing, and flow with new features and requirements

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. These updates enable more flexible and powerful extensions for merchants.

themes.title: App Development and Pricing
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, the Shopify CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0 with various fixes and improvements.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and Security
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has been updated with changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. Identity verification for Shopify Partners has also been introduced to increase trust in the ecosystem.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and comply with updated App Store Requirements policy 1.3
Migrate from deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field before 2026-10
